query:
SELECT ag.id, ag.goalName, ag.ownerName, ag.targetValue, ag.targetUnit, ag.strategicObjective, so.weight as objective_weight
FROM annualGoals ag
LEFT JOIN strategicObjectives so ON ag.strategicObjective = so.name
ORDER BY ag.strategicObjective, ag.goalName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2WVoNFXx8YRPBD4.root --database JzcMSgtkjzvCc45KUk33Lc --execute SELECT ag.id, ag.goalName, ag.ownerName, ag.targetValue, ag.targetUnit, ag.strategicObjective, so.weight as objective_weight
FROM annualGoals ag
LEFT JOIN strategicObjectives so ON ag.strategicObjective = so.name
ORDER BY ag.strategicObjective, ag.goalName;
